name: Validators — unconnected wallet shows connect prompt (not crash)

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://dallasbuyersclub.vercel.app/validators with no wallet connected
Wait for the page to fully render (up to 8 seconds)

The page shows either a 'Connect wallet' prompt OR the validator dashboard header with a clear indication that wallet is required — the page must NOT crash, show a blank screen, or display raw JavaScript error text
The page does NOT show any silent mock data pretending the user is a validator when they have not connected a wallet — no fake validator statistics or fabricated reputation numbers
